title: Everest Client
description: A Lunar or Feather Client alternative for 1.8.9! Skyblock, Bedwars, Skywars you name it!
body:
# The Client For Bedwars A Client for 1.8.9, it comes with free cosmetics provided by More Cosmetics, Replaymod, pre-loaded Shaders, and more! A few things to know 1. For Cosmetics Menu Press: M 2. To Toggle Sprint Press: i 3. To Toggle Zoom Press: C You can adjust these settings in game. - There currently is NO fullbright. Enjoy! ## Version 2.0 is OUT! Download it [HERE!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/everest-client/version/UfKZtvAW)
‖Everest Texture Pack?‖ A custom texturepack for Everest is in the works and will be released when its finished! Stay tuned for the pack release! Since I am busy with other projects it might take a while :)
![Everest Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M8vElGcL/images/65542a54ee6022fc2de4b469f53055b70924cf21.png) **Cosmetics!** ![Everest Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M8vElGcL/images/1b89545efb649546d9dddb773aeaabccae68a071.png) **Mod Configuration Menu Just Like Lunar Or Feather Client!** ![Everest Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M8vElGcL/images/6c43ab88d6d7c7a73bea9b8bbb927def99fa87ad.png) **Pre-Loaded Servers!** ![Everest Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M8vElGcL/images/0823438f28f0c99b387514d53c2ae8d0e43ed339.png) **Pre-Loaded Resource Packs!** ![Everest Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M8vElGcL/images/15b7ffeb9f3603fe2f359bafb3593112a3a4c108.png) **See Your Keystrokes!** **And More!** ### Download ASMR Sounds For YOUR Next Bedwars Game!
🛌 BEDWARS EDITION! 🛌 [Donwload it here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/capx1-asmr-bedwars-edition)
Credit To Better Bedwars Credit to Better Bedwars! Feel free to check out the pack here! [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars)
